steps.title: Read two line points
steps.content: The slope gives the predicted temperature change per hour. Two readable points are about $(0{,}175)$ and $(10{,}575)$.

steps.title: Calculate the rate
steps.content:
Use the slope formula:
$$\frac{575-175}{10-0}=\frac{400}{10}=40$$
The positive slope means the predicted temperature increases by about $40$ degrees Fahrenheit per hour. The answer is B.
